items.name: 3-Piece Karaage
items.description: Crispy Japanese-style fried chicken served over a bed of purple rice.

items.name: Japanese Curry Box
items.description: Rich Japanese curry served with assorted fried vegetables.

items.name: Spicy Sesame Box
items.description: A sesame sauce with spicy mayo topped with green onions and nanami pepper with pickled ginger.

items.name: Citrus Garlic Box
items.description: A citrus soy with garlic mayo topped with pickled soy onions. Also comes with nanami pepper with pickled ginger.

title: Karaage Sandwiches
note: Served on a brioche bun with daikon, topped with a sesame sauce with spicy mayo. Comes with coleslaw and crispy onions.

items.name: Karaage Sandwich (Mild)
items.description: Topped with sesame sauce, spicy mayo.

items.name: Nashville Hot Sandwich
items.description: Spicy karaage topped with buttermilk ranch.

items.name: Panko Fried Hot Dog Skewers
items.description: Served with sesame sauce and spicy mayo.

items.name: Takoyaki
items.description: Japanese octopus wheat flour balls served with your choice of sauce.
